docs.text: microscopemetrics-schema A schema for microscope-metrics, a python package for microscope QC URI: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema Name: microscopemetrics-schema Classes Class Description CentersFitted The fitted center of detected objects. Intended to be used with ROIs. CentersGeometric The geometric center of detected objects. Intended to be used with ROIs. CentersMaxIntensity The position of maximum intensity of detected objects. Intended to be used with ROIs. CentersOfMass The center of mass of detected objects. Intended to be used with ROIs. ChannelSeries A series whose values represent channel Color A color as defined by RGB values and an optional alpha value Comment A comment Experimenter The person that performed the experiment or developed the protocol MetaObject None MetricsDatasetCollection A collection of microscope-metrics datasets MetricsInput An abstract class for analysis inputs ArgolightBInput None ArgolightEInput None FieldIlluminationInput None PSFBeadsInput None MetricsOutput An abstract class for analysis outputs ArgolightBOutput None ArgolightEOutput None FieldIlluminationOutput None PSFBeadsOutput None NamedObject An object with a name and a description Channel A image channel Column A column MetricsObject A base object for all microscope-metrics objects. Device A base object for all microscope-metrics devices Microscope A microscope Image A base object for all microscope-metrics images ImageAsNumpy An image as a numpy array in TZYXC order ImageInline A base object for all microscope-metrics images that are stored as arrays in line Image2D A 2D image in YX order Image5D A 5D image in TZYXC order ImageMask A base object for all microscope-metrics masks KeyValues A collection of key-value pairs ArgolightBDistanceKeyValues None ArgolightBIntensityKeyValues None ArgolightEKeyValues None FieldIlluminationKeyValues None PSFBeadsKeyValues None MetricsDataset A base object on which microscope-metrics runs the analysis ArgolightBDataset An Argolight sample pattern B dataset. This pattern consists of an array of circles ArgolightEDataset An Argolight sample pattern E dataset. It contains resolution data on the axis indicated: - axis 1 = Y resolution = lines along X axis - axis 2 = X resolution = lines along Y axis FieldIlluminationDataset A field illumination dataset PSFBeadsDataset A PSF beads dataset Roi A ROI (Region Of Interest). Collection of shapes and an image to which they are applied ArgolightBCentersOfMass None FieldIlluminationCentersFitted None FieldIlluminationCentersGeometric None FieldIlluminationCentersMaxIntensity None FieldIlluminationCentersOfMass None FieldIlluminationCornersIntensities None FieldIlluminationProfilesIntensity None PSFBeadsCenters None Shape A shape Ellipse An ellipse as defined by x, y coordinates and x and y radii Line A line as defined by x1, y1, x2, y2 coordinates Mask A mask as defined by a boolean image Point A point as defined by x and y coordinates Polygon A polygon as defined by a series of vertexes and a boolean to indicate if closed or not Rectangle A rectangle as defined by x, y coordinates and width, height Table A table TableAsDict A table inlined in a metrics dataset TableAsPandasDF A table as a Pandas DataFrame Tag A tag Protocol Set of instructions for preparing and imaging a sample Sample A sample is a standard physical object that is imaged by a microscope ProfilesIntensity Profiles computed on the image. Intended to be used with ROIs. RoiMeasurements Measurements computed on the ROIs of an image. Intended to be used with ROIs. center_region_intensity_fraction: name: center_region_intensity_fraction description: The fraction of the upper intensity range occupied by the center of illumination region. That is, a value of 0.1 means that the center of illumination occupies the top 10% of the intensity range. microscope-metrics tries to adapt the threshold of this intensity so that the area occupied is not too large. One value per channel. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: center_region_intensity_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 center_region_area_fraction: name: center_region_area_fraction description: The fraction of the area occupied by the center of illumination region. If the centre upper intensity fraction is 0.1, that means that the center of illumination occupies 10% of the area of the image. One value per channel. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: center_region_area_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 center_of_mass_y: name: center_of_mass_y description: The y coordinate of the center of mass of the center of illumination region. That is, a value of 0.1 means that the center of illumination occupies the top 10% of the intensity range. microscope-metrics tries to adapt the threshold of this intensity so that the area occupied is not too large. One value per channel. from_schema: https://w3id.org/MontpellierRessourcesImagerie/microscopemetrics-schema rank: 1000 multivalued: true alias: center_region_intensity_fraction owner: FieldIlluminationKeyValues domain_of: - FieldIlluminationKeyValues range: float minimum_value: 0 maximum_value: 1 center_region_area_fraction: name: center_region_area_fraction description: The fraction of the area occupied by the center of illumination region. docs.text: Slot: center_region_intensity_fraction The fraction of the upper intensity range occupied by the center of illumination region. That is, a value of 0.1 means that the center of illumination occupies the top 10% of the intensity range. microscope-metrics tries to adapt the threshold of this intensity so that the area occupied is not too large. One value per channel. docs.text: Slot: name The human readable name of an entity URI: microscopemetrics_schema:name Applicable Classes Name Description Modifies Slot NamedObject An object with a name and a description no ArgolightBDataset An Argolight sample pattern B dataset no ArgolightBCentersOfMass no ArgolightBIntensityKeyValues no ArgolightBDistanceKeyValues no ArgolightEDataset An Argolight sample pattern E dataset no ArgolightEKeyValues no MetricsObject A base object for all microscope-metrics objects no Device A base object for all microscope-metrics devices no Microscope A microscope no Sample A
